title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Carbon Management
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in March 2024 (information cut-off date Qualitative: November 2023, Quantitative: March 2024). This report provides an introduction to carbon management technology, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.   We would like to thank the following for their contribution and expert review:     Prof John Gibbins    Prof Niall Mac Dowell    Prof Jenny Jones    Prof Paul Halloran    Dr Fran Taylor    Dr Selina Ambrose    Prof Peter Hammond    UKRI    EPSRC    DESNZ    "
